PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Amanda Ebey appearing via zoom for Debra Dolch (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated April 30, 1993 and codicil dated June 03, 2010 is admitted to probate. Debra Dolch is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $275,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for September 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Svahlin. Not reported.
